content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

July 31, 1991

Gary R. Odom  
Attorney at Law  
4075 Main Street, Suite 460  
Riverside, CA 92501

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. I-91-169

Dear Mr. Odom:

You have requested general advice regarding the duties of officeholders under the provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 During the course of our telephone conversation of July 3, 1991, you advised me that you were not seeking this advice on behalf of any of your clients but rather sought to determine whether the provisions of the Act had been violated by local officials.

As I advised you in the course of our telephone conversation, the Commission does not provide advice to a third party about the conduct of a public official unless the third party is the authorized representative of the public official and discloses the name of the official. (Section 83114; Regulation 18329(c).) Therefore, we decline to provide the advice you have requested.

Under separate cover I have sent to you copies of the Act, Regulation 18329, Information Manual A, and some advice letters which may be of assistance to you. Enclosed is a copy of a complaint form. If your questions relate to a public official's past conduct and you believe that conduct is in violation of the Act, you may file a complaint with the Enforcement Division. Please contact the Enforcement Division at (916) 322-6441 if you have any questions about the complaint procedure.

1 Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

We trust this letter adequately responds to your inquiry. Should you have any further questions regarding this matter, do not hesitate to call me at (916) 322-5901.2

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

By: Blanca M. Breeze
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:BMB:dg

2 Copies of Commission regulations and Opinions are available in many law libraries. Alternatively, copies of these materials and Commission advice letters may be obtained from the Commission at a cost of 10¢ per page.
